name: reflink
description: Clipboard reference injector for Wispr Flow — auto-links copied items into dictated text

scripts.release: npm run build && cd dist && rm -f RefLink-arm64.zip && /usr/bin/ditto -c -k --keepParent RefLink-darwin-arm64/RefLink.app RefLink-arm64.zip && echo "→ dist/RefLink-arm64.zip"
